Grab: one person grabbing or seizing another person
a person reaching out and taking hold of someone
Handshake: a greeting where people clasp hands
Hit: a person striking someone with force
an aggressive hit or blow between people
HoldingHands: people standing or moving while holding hands
a hand holding interaction between two people
Hug: people wrapping their arms around each other
Kick: a person striking someone with the leg or foot
a kicking action directed at another person
Posing: a person posing without physical interaction
someone standing or presenting themselves for the camera
a non-contact pose in a lab setting
